# HELP rr_jobs_active Render jobs in progress.
# TYPE rr_jobs_active gauge
rr_jobs_active 2
# HELP rr_jobs_completed_total Render jobs completed.
# TYPE rr_jobs_completed_total counter
rr_jobs_completed_total 87
# HELP rr_verify_failures_total Replays that failed verification.
# TYPE rr_verify_failures_total counter
rr_verify_failures_total 1
# HELP rr_encode_fps Current encode throughput.
# TYPE rr_encode_fps gauge
rr_encode_fps{job="run-a/000123"} 59.94
